title: • Reflection: In what moments today did my actions align with my belief
content:
• Reflection: In what moments today did my actions align with my beliefs? When did they diverge?
    • Day 7
    MORNING
    • Morning Reading: "'You have found salvation from death,' Siddhartha said [to Gotama]. 'It has come to you in your own seeking, on your own path, through thought, through meditation, through knowledge, through enlightenment. You have learned it not through teaching.'"
    • Today's Intention: I will celebrate a friend's path today, even if it is different from my own.
    NIGHT
    • Night Reading: "‘I, too, would like to look and smile, sit and walk like that, so free, so worthy, so restrained, so frank, so childlike and mysterious. A man only looks and walks like that when he has conquered his Self.’"
    • Reflection: What did it feel like to part ways with a person or an idea I once held dear? Reflecting on the week, what have I chosen to leave behind?
    Week 2: The World of the Senses
    Weekly Goals:
    • Goal 1:
    • Goal 2:
    • Goal 3:
    Day 8
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 13 (chunk 13/29)
